response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C++ (though not primary), distributed systems, and real-time data processing. However, his lack of direct experience with modern C++ geospatial routing pipelines, navigation systems, or geospatial data optimization (key requirements) raises concerns. His recent work at Stripe and Shopify is strong but not directly aligned with routing tiling or navigation data pipelines.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby, Shopify)
Proven ability to design and build scalable data platforms (e.g., Geo-Data platform, GISCollective)
Experience with C/C++ and system-level programming (National Instruments, Apon)
concerns: Limited direct experience with modern C++ geospatial routing pipelines or navigation systems
No demonstrated expertise in routing data optimization or tile generation (core responsibilities)
Recent roles (Stripe, Shopify) focus on web/mobile stacks rather than geospatial or routing engineering

key_factors.factor: Distributed systems and low-latency data processing
